1.gl: a burden; specifically, tribute, or (abstractly) porterage; figuratively, an utterance, chiefly adoom, especially singing; mental, desire
1.kj: burden, carry away, prophecy, [idiom] they set, song, tribute.

1.gl: properly, to be burly, i.e. (figuratively) powerful (passively, impregnable); by implication, to ravage
1.kj: dead, destroy(-er), oppress, robber, spoil(-er), [idiom] utterly, (lay) waste.

1.gl: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
1.dv: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father;

1.gl: to be dumb or silent; hence, to fail or perish; trans. to destroy
1.kj: cease, be cut down (off), destroy, be brought to silence, be undone, [idiom] utterly.

1.gl: properly, a twist (away of the light), i.e. night; figuratively, adversity
1.dv: or (Isaiah 21:11) לֵיל; also לַיְלָה; from the same as H3883 (לוּל);

1.gl: Kir, a place in Assyrian; also one in Moab

2.gl: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative
2.kj: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, [phrase] shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off,

2.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
2.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
2.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

2.gl: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
2.dv: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father;

2.gl: to scrape off; by implication, to shave, remove, lessen, withhold
2.kj: abate, clip, (di-) minish, do (take) away, keep back, restrain, make small, withdraw.

2.gl: Dibon, the name of three places in Palestine
Nebo, the name of a Babylonian deity, also of a mountain in Moab, and of a place in Palestine

3.gl: to descend (literally, to go downwards; or conventionally to a lower region, as the shore, a boundary, the enemy, etc.; or figuratively, to fall); causatively, to bring down (in all the above applications)
3.kj: [idiom] abundantly, bring down, carry down, cast down, (cause to) come(-ing) down, fall (down), get down, go(-ing) down(-ward), hang down, [idiom] indeed, let down, light (down), p

3.gl: properly, separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors
3.kj: abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without.
3.dv: or (shortened) חֻץ; (both forms feminine in the plural) from an unused root meaning to sever;

3.gl: properly, a mesh (as allowing a liquid to run through), i.e. coarse loose cloth or sacking (used in mourning and for bagging); hence, a bag (for grain, etc.)
a roof; by analogy, the top of an altar
3.kj: roof (of the house), (house) top (of the house).

3.gl: to gird on (as a belt, armor, etc.)
3.kj: be able to put on, be afraid, appointed, gird, restrain, [idiom] on every side.

3.gl: a width, i.e. (concretely) avenue or area
3.kj: broad place (way), street. See also H1050 (בֵּית רְחוֹב).

4.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
4.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

4.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
4.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

4.gl: to pull off; hence (intensively) to strip, (reflex.) to depart; by implication, to deliver, equip (for fight); present, strengthen
4.kj: arm (self), (go, ready) armed ([idiom] man, soldier), deliver, draw out, make fat, loose, (ready) prepared, put off, take away, withdraw self.
[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
4.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

4.gl: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
4.kj: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

4.gl: to shriek (from anguish or danger); by analogy, (as a herald) to announce or convene publicly
4.kj: assemble, call (together), (make a) cry (out), come with such a company, gather (together), cause to be proclaimed.

5.gl: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative
5.kj: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, [phrase] shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off,

5.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
5.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

5.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
5.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

5.gl: an elevation, i.e. (concretely) acclivity or platform; abstractly (the relation or state) a rise or (figuratively) priority
5.kj: ascent, before, chiefest, cliff, that goeth up, going up, hill, mounting up, stairs.

5.gl: to shriek (from anguish or danger); by analogy, (as a herald) to announce or convene publicly
5.kj: assemble, call (together), (make a) cry (out), come with such a company, gather (together), cause to be proclaimed.

5.gl: a fracture, figuratively, ruin; specifically, a solution (of a dream)
5.kj: affliction, breach, breaking, broken(-footed, -handed), bruise, crashing, destruction, hurt, interpretation, vexation.

6.gl: to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume)
6.kj: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] ha

6.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
6.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

6.gl: to be ashamed, confused or disappointed; also (as failing) to dry up (as water) or wither (as herbage)
6.kj: be ashamed, clean, be confounded, (make) dry (up), (do) shame(-fully), [idiom] utterly, wither (away).

6.gl: properly, pallor, i.e. hence, the yellowish green of young and sickly vegetation; concretely, verdure, i.e. grass or vegetation
6.dv: from H3417 (יָרָק) (in the sense of vacuity of color);

6.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
6.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

6.gl: Nimrim, a place East of the Jordan
6.dv: plural of a masculine corresponding to H5247 (נִמְרָה); clear waters;

7.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
7.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

7.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
7.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

7.gl: a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine)
7.dv: or (feminine) נַחְלָה; (Psalm 124:4), or נַחֲלָה; (Ezekiel 47:19; Ezekiel 48:28), from H5157 (נָחַל) in its original sense;

7.kj: account, (that have the) charge, custody, that which...laid up, numbers, office(-r), ordering, oversight, [phrase] prison, reckoning, visitation.

7.gl: a willow (from the use of osiers as wattles)

8.gl: to strike with more or less violence (beat, fell, corrode); by implication (of attack) to knock together, i.e. surround or circulate
8.kj: compass (about, -ing), cut down, destroy, go round (about), inclose, round.

8.gl: properly, a cord (as twisted), i.e. (by implication) a boundary; by extension the territory inclosed
8.kj: border, bound, coast, [idiom] great, landmark, limit, quarter, space.

8.gl: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
8.dv: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father;

8.gl: Beer-Elim, a place in the Desert
8.dv: from H875 (בְּאֵר) and the plural of H410 (אֵל); well of heroes;
and (feminine) זְעָקָהxlit zᵉâqâh corrected to zᵉʻâqâh; from H2199 (זָעַק);
dual of H96 (אֶגֶל).; a double pond;

9.gl: to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing)
9.kj: add, [idiom] again, [idiom] any more, [idiom] cease, [idiom] come more, [phrase] conceive again, continue, exceed, [idiom] further, [idiom] gather together, get more, give more-ove

9.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
9.kj: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness

9.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)
to place (in a very wide application)
9.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

9.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
9.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

9.gl: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
9.dv: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father;
